name: tiktok-shop-pp-mcp
description: Safe v1 TikTok Shop Printing Press MCP. Read-only commerce tools and token refresh are sourced from official Partner Center docs; mutations are deferred.

tiktok_shop_app_key.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_APP_KEY
tiktok_shop_app_key.description: TikTok Shop Partner Center app key. Official auth docs: https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75

tiktok_shop_app_secret.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_APP_SECRET
tiktok_shop_app_secret.description: TikTok Shop Partner Center app secret used for official HMAC-SHA256 signing. Never commit this value.

tiktok_shop_access_token.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_ACCESS_TOKEN
tiktok_shop_access_token.description: Access token from the official TikTok Shop authorization flow. Sent only as x-tts-access-token.

tiktok_shop_refresh_token.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_REFRESH_TOKEN
tiktok_shop_refresh_token.description: Refresh token from the official TikTok Shop authorization flow. Required only for auth refresh.

tiktok_shop_shop_id.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_SHOP_ID
tiktok_shop_shop_id.description: Optional shop identifier for local bookkeeping. API calls use shop_cipher where official docs require it.

tiktok_shop_shop_cipher.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_SHOP_CIPHER
tiktok_shop_shop_cipher.description: Shop cipher returned by Get Authorized Shops; required for shop-scoped order/product/inventory/logistics calls.

tiktok_shop_base_url.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_BASE_URL
tiktok_shop_base_url.description: Optional override. Defaults to official https://open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com.

tiktok_shop_auth_base_url.title: TIKTOK_SHOP_AUTH_BASE_URL
tiktok_shop_auth_base_url.description: Optional override. Defaults to official https://auth.tiktok-shops.com.
